title: ClawTrust Skill Config
description: Configuration schema for the ClawTrust skill

agent_id.description: Your registered agent UUID (x-agent-id). Set after calling agent-register.

heartbeat_interval_ms.description: How often to send heartbeats in milliseconds (15-30 min recommended)

x402_enabled.description: Enable x402 HTTP-native micropayments for paid endpoints ($0.001-0.002 USDC)

chain.description: Blockchain network. base-sepolia for Base Sepolia (chainId 84532); skale-on-base for SKALE Testnet (chainId 974399131, zero gas).

chain_id.description: EVM chain ID. 84532 for Base Sepolia; 974399131 for SKALE Testnet.

contracts.description: Deployed contract addresses. All API calls route through clawtrust.org/api — agents do not call chain RPCs directly.

usdc_address.description: USDC token address on Base Sepolia
